sentences.target: Je prends une salade, s'il vous plaît.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ yn sa.lad sil vu plɛ/

translations.fr: Je prends une salade, s'il vous plaît.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ yn sa.lad sil vu plɛ/
translations.vi: Cho tôi một phần salad, làm ơn.
translations.id: Saya pesan satu salad, terima kasih.
translations.ro: Aș dori o salată, vă rog.
translations.ja: サラダをお願いします。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; main verb.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'prends'.
Elided subordinating conjunction before vowel; part of the fixed polite formula 's'il vous plaît'.
3rd person singular subject pronoun of 'plaît' in the polite expression.
2nd person pronoun, indirect object of 'plaire' in the formula.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; verb in expression 's'il vous plaît' ('please').

sentences.target: On partage la salade avec du pain.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁtaʒ la sa.lad avɛk dy pɛ̃/

translations.fr: On partage la salade avec du pain.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁtaʒ la sa.lad avɛk dy pɛ̃/
translations.en: We’re sharing the salad with some bread.
translations.es: Compartimos la ensalada con un poco de pan.
translations.de: Wir teilen den Salat mit etwas Brot.
translations.it: Condividiamo l'insalata con un po' di pane.
translations.ko: 우리는 빵과 함께 샐러드를 나눠 먹고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们一起分着吃沙拉，还配些面包。
translations.yue: 我哋一齊分嚟食個沙律，配啲麵包。
translations.ru: Мы делим салат и едим его с хлебом.
translations.pt: Estamos compartilhando a salada com um pouco de pão.
translations.he: אנחנו חולקים את הסלט עם קצת לחם.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chia sẻ món salad với một ít bánh mì.
translations.ar: نحن نتشارك السلطة مع بعض الخبز.
translations.nl: We delen de salade met wat brood.
translations.uk: Ми ділимося салатом і їмо його з хлібом.
translations.hu: Megosztjuk a salátát egy kis kenyérrel.
translations.hi: हम सलाद को कुछ रोटी के साथ बाँट रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Dzielimy się sałatką z odrobiną chleba.
translations.el: Μοιραζόμαστε τη σαλάτα με λίγο ψωμί.
translations.nb: Vi deler salaten med litt brød.
translations.id: Kami berbagi salad dengan sedikit roti.
translations.sv: Vi delar på salladen med lite bröd.
translations.cs: Dělíme se o salát s trochou chleba.
translations.da: Vi deler salaten med lidt brød.
translations.ja: 私たちはサラダをパンと一緒に分け合っています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun meaning 'we' here.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular agreeing with 'on'; main verb.
Definite article, feminine singular, marking the noun.
Feminine singular noun; direct object of 'partage'.
Preposition introducing a comitative complement.
Partitive article (contraction of 'de le'), indicating an unspecified quantity.
Masculine singular noun; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Tu peux prendre une salade pour ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty pø pʁɑ̃dʁ yn sa.lad puʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu peux prendre une salade pour ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty pø pʁɑ̃dʁ yn sa.lad puʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: Can you get a salad for tonight?
translations.es: ¿Puedes comprar una ensalada para esta noche?
translations.de: Kannst du für heute Abend einen Salat besorgen?
translations.ko: 오늘 저녁에 샐러드 하나 사 올 수 있어?
translations.zh-Hans: 你今晚能买一份沙拉吗？
translations.yue: 你今晚可唔可以買份沙律？
translations.ru: Ты можешь купить салат на вечер?
translations.pt: Você pode comprar uma salada para hoje à noite?
translations.tr: Bu akşam için bir salata alabilir misin?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể mua một phần salad cho tối nay không?
translations.ar: هل يمكنك شراء سلطة لهذا المساء؟
translations.nl: Kun je voor vanavond een salade halen?
translations.uk: Ти можеш купити салат на сьогодні ввечері?
translations.hi: क्या तुम आज रात के लिए एक सलाद ला सकते हो?
translations.pl: Czy możesz kupić sałatkę na dzisiejszy wieczór?
translations.el: Μπορείς να πάρεις μια σαλάτα για απόψε?
translations.nb: Kan du kjøpe en salat til i kveld?
translations.id: Bisakah kamu membeli salad untuk malam ini?
translations.sv: Kan du köpa en sallad till ikväll?
translations.ro: Poți să cumperi o salată pentru diseară?
translations.da: Kan du købe en salat til i aften?
translations.ja: 今夜のためにサラダを買ってきてくれる？

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; modal auxiliary expressing ability.
Infinitive complement of 'peux'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular.
Feminine singular noun; direct object of 'prendre'.
Preposition introducing a time/purpose complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'soir'.
Masculine singular noun; temporal complement ('this evening').

sentences.target: Votre salade a l'air vraiment bonne.

translations.fr: Votre salade a l'air vraiment bonne.
translations.es: Tu ensalada tiene muy buena pinta.
translations.de: Dein Salat sieht wirklich gut aus.
translations.it: La tua insalata sembra davvero buona.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的沙拉看起来真的很好。
translations.yue: 你嘅沙律睇落去真係好正。
translations.vi: Salad của bạn trông thật ngon.
translations.nl: Je salade ziet er echt goed uit.
translations.hu: A salátád tényleg nagyon jól néz ki.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा सलाद वाकई बहुत अच्छा लग रहा है।
translations.el: Η σαλάτα σου φαίνεται πραγματικά καλή.
translations.nb: Salaten din ser skikkelig god ut.
translations.sv: Din sallad ser verkligen god ut.
translations.da: Din salat ser virkelig god ud.
translations.ja: あなたのサラダは本当においしそうです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person plural/formal), agreeing with 'salade'.
Feminine singular noun; subject of the clause.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main verb in the expression 'avoir l'air'.

Noun meaning 'appearance'; complement in the idiom 'avoir l'air'.
Adverb intensifying the adjective.
Adjective, feminine singular agreeing with 'salade'; predicate complement after 'avoir l'air'.
